text:
(In reply to Oliver Heesakkers from comment #2)
>You appear to be building using openmp, but openmp is neither required nor >requested for graphics/zbar.

Without the slightest idea where it came from,
but I'm build some other ports with OpenMP

It is a complete log of what I own.

In general, I do not use the default options.
